title: Correct BST with two nodes swapped

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Correct BST with two nodes swapped". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/recover-binary-search-tree/
constraints: The number of nodes in the tree is in the range [2, 100].
content.inputFormat: The input is the root of a binary search tree where two nodes are swapped.
content.outputFormat: The output is the root of the recovered binary search tree.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Inorder traversal to find the two swapped nodes and then swap them back.
